title: DataForge Knowledge Sources Schema
description: Whitelist of knowledge sources fetched by researcher agents, with TTL and fetch-state tracking. Lives at ~/.claude/dataforge/knowledge/sources.json (live) and seeded from references/seed-sources/.

last_global_refresh.description: Timestamp of the most recent /dataforge-learn all run

category.description: What kind of knowledge this source contributes

area.description: The specific area this source feeds (library name, domain name, role name). Must match a KB namespace, e.g. 'sklearn', 'finance', 'ml-engineer'.

track.description: Which execution track this source is relevant to. 'common' applies everywhere.

tier.description: Trust tier. official = library docs/changelogs; research = arxiv/papers-with-code/distill; blog = thought leaders + big-tech eng; hackathon = Kaggle/Numerai writeups; user = runtime-provided URL.

ttl_days.description: Refresh interval for this source. Defaults: library=7, research=14, domain=30, role=30.

last_hash.description: Content hash of the last successful fetch, for change detection

enabled.description: Setup wizard can disable individual sources

notes.description: Optional human-readable reason for including this source
